goal: Build a robot-to-robot handoff station: 2 Frankas, robot A picks cubes from conveyor + drops at handoff station, robot B picks from handoff + drops in bin. Uses setup_robot_handoff_signal to define the handoff position. Realizes research scenario #11 'Fixed-Point Robot-to-Robot Handoff'.
thoughts:
Six handoff specifics for CP-51 (extends CP-02 — single-robot relay → two-robot handoff via marker):
1) 2 Frankas at x=±0.7, both facing +Y.
2) Single conveyor at y=0.4, cube starts at -1.4. Belt carries cube to robot A's pick zone.
3) Robot A picks from conveyor, drops at handoff marker /World/Handoff at xy=(0, -0.3, 0.825). Position chosen to be in BOTH robots' reach (sqrt(0.7^2+0.3^2) = 0.76m, within 0.85m).
4) Robot B picks from handoff marker, drops in /World/Bin at xy=(0, -0.7, 0.75). Within reach (sqrt(0.7^2+0.7^2)=0.99m — borderline, use closer xy if needed).
5) Two controller installs — A's source_paths includes Cube_1, drop_target = handoff. B's source_paths also includes Cube_1 (after A's drop), drop_target = bin.
6) Handoff marker prim has state attrs but RUNTIME CLAIM not enforced (no controller integration). Robots may try to grab simultaneously.
code:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# Robot A — left, picks from conveyor
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/FrankaA",
    position=[-0.7, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)
# Robot B — right, picks from handoff
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/FrankaB",
    position=[ 0.7, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[-0.7, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[3.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", prim_type="Cube", position=[-2.0, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", schema_name=api)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=["/World/Cube_1"], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
apply_physics_material(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", material_name="rubber")

# Handoff station — marker prim used for coordination
setup_robot_handoff_signal(
    handoff_path="/World/Handoff",
    position=[0, -0.3, 0.825],
    robot_a="/World/FrankaA",
    robot_b="/World/FrankaB",
)

# Final bin behind robot B
create_bin(prim_path="/World/Bin", position=[0.7, -0.5, 0.75], size=[0.3, 0.3, 0.15])

# Sensors
add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/SensorA", position=[-0.3, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])
add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/SensorB", position=[0.0, -0.3, 0.85], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

# Robot A controller — picks from belt, drops at handoff
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/FrankaA",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/SensorA",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=["/World/Cube_1"],
    destination_path="/World/Handoff",
    drop_target=[0, -0.3, 0.825],
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/Handoff", "/World/Bin"],
)

# Robot B controller — picks from handoff, drops in bin
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/FrankaB",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/SensorB",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=["/World/Cube_1"],
    destination_path="/World/Bin",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/Handoff", "/World/Bin"],
)
extension_notes: CP-51 demonstrates robot-to-robot handoff via fixed-point marker. CP-02 used belt-mediated relay; CP-51 uses direct robot-to-robot via shared station. Realizes research scenario #11. Runtime claim coordination NOT implemented — robots may race; future work needs setup_robot_claim_mutex + controller hooks.
failure_modes: Both robots try to pick Cube_1 simultaneously — race condition. Mitigated by sensor zones (A's sensor at -0.3, B's at 0); cube must be at one zone OR other.
Handoff position at sqrt(0.7^2+0.3^2)=0.76m from each robot — within 0.85m reach.
Bin at sqrt(0.7^2+0.7^2)=0.99m from FrankaB — at reach LIMIT. May fail planning. Move closer if needed.
